nasb.text: Now Jesus had spoken of his death, but they thought that He was speaking of literal sleep.

esv.text: Now Jesus had spoken of his death, but they thought that he meant taking rest in sleep.

cnv.text: 其實耶穌是指著拉撒路的死說的，門徒卻以為他是指正常的睡眠說的。

ccb.text: 其实耶稣是指他已经死了，门徒却以为他真的睡了。

csbs.text: 其实耶稣说的是拉撒路的死，他们却以为他说的是睡觉休息。
